title: YouTube’s picture-in-picture mode is broken on Android and iOS. Google says it is investigating.
summary: YouTube’s picture-in-picture mode is broken on both Android and iOS. Google acknowledged the bug and says its teams are “actively investigating. “ YouTube’s picture-in-picture mode is failing on both Android and iOS for a growing number of users.
